Product Team Meeting - September 15, 2025

Attendees: Sarah Chen (PM), Mike Torres (Eng Lead), Lisa Park (Design), James Wu (Data)

Action Items:
1. Mike: Finish API v2 migration by October 1st
2. Lisa: User testing for new dashboard by September 22nd
3. James: Set up A/B test for recommendation engine
4. Sarah: Write PRD for mobile notifications feature

Discussion Notes:
- Dashboard redesign is 80% complete, blocked on new charting library selection
- API v2 breaking changes require 30-day deprecation notice to partners
- Recommendation engine showing 15% improvement in click-through rate in staging
- Mobile app crash rate spiked to 2.3% after last release, hotfix planned for Friday
